title: Run 14-day effectiveness review and calibrate budgets
goal: Measure whether storage growth is bounded after rollout, validate false-positive and false-negative behavior, and adjust budgets only from observed data.

approval.note: Source changes and read-only verification are authorized. Runtime deletion or cleanup effects require a fresh exact-target plan and post-readback.

acceptance.assertion: Fourteen days of observations show producer-level growth and cleanup outcomes.
Temporary and regenerable storage remains within the approved global budget or exceptions are explicit.
Any threshold change cites observed distributions and consequences.
The initiative closes only after live prevention and recovery behavior are verified.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
